top_findings.summary: The skill requests "Bash(curl:*)" which grants unrestricted ability to execute any curl command, potentially allowing network calls to arbitrary endpoints unrelated to OpenAPI spec generation. Combined with unrestricted "Read, Write, Edit" file system access, this exceeds the minimal permissions needed for a tool focused on generating API specifications and configurations. While some network/file access may be justified for fetching remote specs or writing local files, the wildcard permissions introduce unnecessary risk.
